mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_meatmoney_txn ( member_id, txn_dt, txn_type_cd, io_type_cd, summary, order_id, use_amt, earn_amt, balance_amt, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{memberPk}, NOW(), #{changeType}, CASE WHEN #{changeAmt} >= 0 THEN 'I' ELSE 'O' END, #{reason}, #{refId}, CASE WHEN #{changeAmt} < 0 THEN ABS(#{changeAmt}) ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN #{changeAmt} > 0 THEN #{changeAmt} ELSE 0 END, #{balanceAmt}, #{regId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT txn_id AS history_id, member_id AS member_id, txn_type_cd AS trx_type_cd, CASE WHEN io_type_cd = 'I' THEN earn_amt ELSE use_amt * -1 END AS change_amt, balance_amt AS balance, order_id AS ref_order_no, summary AS remark, reg_dt FROM tb_meatmoney_txn WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY reg_dt DESC
